enrichment.summary: Kyle films a brief vlog on January 23, 2017 from Boulder, giving a low-energy update on his day: he's been intensively working on his website, made fast progress, and spent the day testing and refining the design. He also mentions listening to history podcasts and dealing with internet/backup issues.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Impressed by his own speed but frustrated by design indecision — wants it to look polished and symmetrical
Reluctant; didn't feel like talking today and only made the video out of routine
